reasons: GET /feed returns 200 application/atom+xml with 50 entries and 44 KB of body; stable replayable surface.
All HTML routes (/, /leaderboard/{Y}/{M}/{D}, /posts/{slug}, /topics/{slug}, /@{user}, /collections, /newsletters/archive) return 403 via curl with Chrome UA due to Cloudflare Turnstile.
Playwright Chromium was served the 'Just a moment...' challenge page and could not clear it during browser-sniff.

protections.label: cloudflare_turnstile
notes: HTML routes return 403 with Cloudflare challenge HTML (cdn-cgi/challenge-platform).
Interactive challenge did not auto-solve in Playwright Chromium within 28 seconds.

candidate_commands.name: search
candidate_commands.rationale: FTS over stored titles and taglines

candidate_commands.name: export
candidate_commands.rationale: CSV/JSON export matching scraper column set

candidate_commands.name: open
candidate_commands.rationale: Open canonical PH URL in browser

warnings.message: All producthunt.com HTML routes return 403 to non-browser HTTP clients. Features that require per-post / per-topic / per-user HTML must ship as explicit stubs. The /feed?category= query parameter is ignored server-side; do not ship a category filter that claims it works.
Playwright Chromium could not clear the Cloudflare Turnstile interactive challenge during browser-sniff; no XHR capture was possible.
